text: Hi! We'd love to help you build your project. Could you share what kind of app or website you are looking to create?
Understood, I have updated your target budget to $5,000. To make sure we align the scope with that budget, could you clarify if you need a custom admin panel?
Since we are now adding real-time video streaming to the scope, that will increase the estimated development effort. The new estimated cost will reflect this addition.
requirements: User authentication, chat, real-time video streaming

text: I understand. Let's adjust the scope. We will remove the complex matching algorithm and stick to a simple list view for now. Here are the updated requirements: User login, profile creation, and a searchable list of service providers.
requirements: User login, profile creation, searchable list of service providers

text: Since you mentioned needing a landing page along with the mobile app, we will add React.js for the web frontend alongside Flutter for the mobile app and Python for the backend.
